description: Agent extends a multi-value base (checkbox-group) with a custom widget; exercises child-subscription patterns documented in references/subscribe-api.md.
userMessage: Create a custom `chip-selector` component that extends checkbox-group and renders each option as a toggleable chip. Use fd:viewType `chip-selector`.

rubric.description: The scaffolder is invoked with --base checkbox-group (not --base text-input or another unrelated base).

The agent acknowledges or implements child subscriptions — either by reading references/subscribe-api.md, by iterating child inputs in decorate(), or by setting up per-child listeners. Evidence may be in code or tool calls.
The component's subscribe call includes `{ listenChanges: true }` as required by the skill's critical rules.
The agent reads references/subscribe-api.md during the session.
